fields.name: Fantasy
fields.description: Features magic, supernatural elements, and is often inspired by mythology or folklore. High fantasy is set in entirely fictional worlds, while low fantasy or magical realism weaves magic into real-world settings

fields.name: Science Fiction
fields.description: Preoccupied with real or real-feeling science, often set in the distant future and exploring themes like time travel and space exploration

fields.name: Mystery
fields.description: Characterized by a gripping plot revolving around a crime that must be solved by the protagonist, often featuring a detective or amateur sleuth

fields.name: Romance
fields.description: Centers on a romantic relationship as the main plot point, typically ending with a "happily ever after" .

fields.name: Thriller & Suspense
fields.description: Uses psychological fear and high emotional stakes to build suspense, with the protagonist often acting to save their own life rather than solve a crime .

fields.name: Young Adult (YA)
fields.description: Targets readers aged 12-18, following teenage characters navigating the challenges of adolescence.

fields.name: Memoir & Autobiography
fields.description: True accounts of the author's life, with memoirs emphasizing defining emotional moments and autobiographies providing chronological life events.

fields.name: Self-Help
fields.description: Books that encourage personal improvement and confidence in areas like relationships, emotional well-being, or finances

fields.name: True Crime
fields.description: Chronicles real crimes in detail, presenting true stories that read like well-crafted fiction.

fields.name: Adventure
fields.description: Adventure is a genre centered on exciting, often dangerous journeys or quests where the protagonist faces physical challenges, exploration, and high-stakes situations. The focus is on action, discovery, and overcoming obstacles rather than character development or romance.

fields.title: Life of Pi
fields.author: Yann Martel
fields.description:
Life of Pi is a Canadian novel that tells the extraordinary story of Piscine Molitor "Pi" Patel, a young Indian boy from Pondicherry. The narrative follows Pi's 227-day survival journey after a shipwreck leaves him stranded on a lifeboat in the Pacific Ocean with a Bengal tiger named Richard Parker, along with other zoo animals .

The novel explores profound themes of spirituality, faith, and the nature of reality. Pi, who practices Hinduism, Christianity, and Islam simultaneously, uses his spiritual beliefs and resourcefulness to survive his ordeal. The book raises philosophical questions about the relativity of truth and how stories are perceived and told .

fields.title: The Priory of the Orange Tree
fields.author: Samantha Shannon
fields.description: A world-encompassing epic fantasy with dragons and mages.

fields.title: The Diary of Samuel Pepys
fields.author: Samuel Pepys
fields.description: A fascinating personal account of life in 17th-century London.

fields.title: To Kill a Mockingbird
fields.author: Harper Lee
fields.description: A classic novel about justice and innocence in the American South.

fields.title: The Best of Me
fields.author: Nicholas Sparks
fields.description: A poignant story of two former high school sweethearts who reunite.

fields.title: Dreamer's Folly
fields.author: James S.A. Corey
fields.description: A space opera set in a future where humanity has colonized the solar system.

fields.title: Atomic Habits
fields.author: James Clear
fields.description: An easy and proven way to build good habits and break bad ones.

fields.title: The Silent Patient
fields.author: Alex Michaelides
fields.description: A shocking psychological thriller about a woman's act of violence against her husband.

fields.title: I'll Be Gone in the Dark
fields.author: Michelle McNamara
fields.description: A chilling account of the Golden State Killer and the woman who hunted him.

fields.title: The Hate U Give
fields.author: Angie Thomas
fields.description: A powerful story about a teenage girl who witnesses the fatal shooting of her childhood best friend.
